'''thopashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:phaeosporous|phaeosporous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-p-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phaeosporous|phaeosporous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thopashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thopashithi|thopashithi]] || [[word:thopashiji|thopashiji]] || [[word:thopashishi|thopashishi]] || [[word:thopashiki|thopashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thopashuthuthu|thopashuthuthu]] || [[word:thopashujuju|thopashujuju]] || [[word:thopashushushu|thopashushushu]] || [[word:thopashukuku|thopashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopashuthu|thopashuthu]] || [[word:thopashuju|thopashuju]] || [[word:thopashushu|thopashushu]] || [[word:thopashuku|thopashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopashufthuf|thopashufthuf]] || [[word:thopashufjuf|thopashufjuf]] || [[word:thopashufshuf|thopashufshuf]] || [[word:thopashufkuf|thopashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thopashethe|thopashethe]] || [[word:thopasheje|thopasheje]] || [[word:thopasheshe|thopasheshe]] || [[word:thopasheke|thopasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thopashothotho|thopashothotho]] || [[word:thopashojojo|thopashojojo]] || [[word:thopashoshosho|thopashoshosho]] || [[word:thopashokoko|thopashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopashotho|thopashotho]] || [[word:thopashojo|thopashojo]] || [[word:thopashosho|thopashosho]] || [[word:thopashoko|thopashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopashofthof|thopashofthof]] || [[word:thopashofjof|thopashofjof]] || [[word:thopashofshof|thopashofshof]] || [[word:thopashofkof|thopashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfthĂŻf|thopashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfjĂŻf|thopashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfshĂŻf|thopashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfkĂŻf|thopashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thopashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thopashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thopashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thopashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfthĂŻf|thopashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfjĂŻf|thopashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfshĂŻf|thopashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfkĂŻf|thopashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfthĂŻf|thopashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfjĂŻf|thopashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfshĂŻf|thopashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thopashĂŻfkĂŻf|thopashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thopashĂŠthĂŠ|thopashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thopashĂŠjĂŠ|thopashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thopashĂŠshĂŠ|thopashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thopashĂŠkĂŠ|thopashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thopashathatha|thopashathatha]] || [[word:thopashajaja|thopashajaja]] || [[word:thopashashasha|thopashashasha]] || [[word:thopashakaka|thopashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopashatha|thopashatha]] || [[word:thopashaja|thopashaja]] || [[word:thopashasha|thopashasha]] || [[word:thopashaka|thopashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopashafthaf|thopashafthaf]] || [[word:thopashafjaf|thopashafjaf]] || [[word:thopashafshaf|thopashafshaf]] || [[word:thopashafkaf|thopashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thopashasha|thopashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thopashĂ«sha|thopashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thopashrosha|thopashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thopashmusha|thopashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thopashyasha|thopashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothopashnkshĂ«sha|gothopashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothopashnkrosha|gothopashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothopashnkmusha|gothopashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothopashnkyasha|gothopashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thopapashasha|thopapashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thopapashĂ«sha|thopapashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thopapashrosha|thopapashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thopapashmusha|thopapashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thopapashyasha|thopapashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothopapashnkshĂ«sha|gothopapashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothopapashnkrosha|gothopapashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothopapashnkmusha|gothopapashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothopapashnkyasha|gothopapashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thepĂŠshasha|thepĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thepĂŠshĂ«sha|thepĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thepĂŠshrosha|thepĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thepĂŠshmusha|thepĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thepĂŠshyasha|thepĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothepĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|gothepĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothepĂŠshnkrosha|gothepĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothepĂŠshnkmusha|gothepĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothepĂŠshnkyasha|gothepĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thopfashasha|thopfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thopfashĂ«sha|thopfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thopfashrosha|thopfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thopfashmusha|thopfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thopfashyasha|thopfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothopfashnkshĂ«sha|gothopfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothopfashnkrosha|gothopfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothopfashnkmusha|gothopfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothopfashnkyasha|gothopfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
